description: Represents a user-defined function (UDF) definition in the AWS Glue Data Catalog.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user-defined function.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user-defined function.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DatabaseName.description: The name of the catalog database in which the function is located.
DatabaseName.markdownDescription:
The name of the catalog database in which the function is located.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\u0020-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF\t]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

FunctionName.markdownDescription:
The name of the function.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\u0020-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF\t]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

ClassName.description: The Java class that contains the function code.
ClassName.markdownDescription:
The Java class that contains the function code.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\u0020-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF\t]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

OwnerName.markdownDescription:
The owner of the function.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[\u0020-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF\t]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

OwnerType.markdownDescription:
The owner type.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: USER | ROLE | GROUP  
Update requires: No interruption

FunctionType.markdownDescription:
The type of the function.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: REGULAR_FUNCTION | AGGREGATE_FUNCTION | STORED_PROCEDURE  
Update requires: Replacement

ResourceUris.description: The resource URIs for the function.
ResourceUris.markdownDescription:
The resource URIs for the function.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceType.markdownDescription:
The type of the resource.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: JAR | FILE | ARCHIVE  
Update requires: No interruption

Uri.description: The URI for accessing the resource.
Uri.markdownDescription:
The URI for accessing the resource.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^[\u0020-\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF\r\n\t]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceUri.markdownDescription:
The URIs for function resources.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
